summary: Investor Demo Flow testing completed successfully. All 10 features verified working for VC presentation. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page shows 'Investor Metrics' link in navbar with BarChart3 icon
Investor Dashboard (/investors) loads without login and shows platform metrics
Investor Dashboard shows Revenue Model pie chart (50% creator, 40% investors, 10% platform)
Investor Dashboard shows 7-Day Trading Volume chart
Investor Dashboard shows Trading Statistics (24h volume, 7d volume, transactions)
Investor Dashboard shows Share Ownership metrics
Dashboard shows Live Activity Feed on the right side with real-time transactions
Live Activity Feed shows user actions (bought/sold/redeemed) with ticker symbols
Video page shows simplified trading card with price, chart, available shares
Video page shows ticker symbol (e.g., $EMMA_0126R1)
Video page shows Early Investor Bonus info (2.5x bonus for platinum tier)
Video page shows Revenue Distribution breakdown
Video page shows Top Earners leaderboard
User can add video to watchlist (Watch button)
Watchlist page shows Investment Thesis Card when video is selected
Investment Thesis Card shows Investment Score (0-100)
Investment Thesis Card shows Key Metrics (Price Momentum, Views, Available Shares)
Investment Thesis Card shows 'Why Invest?' analysis
User can buy shares via Buy Shares dialog with slider
Buy shares shows price impact after purchase
Portfolio page shows holdings with current values
Portfolio page shows Investment History chart
Portfolio page shows Allocation pie chart
Sidebar shows 'Investor Metrics' navigation link
critical_code_review_comments: All investor demo features are fully implemented and working
Investor Dashboard is publicly accessible without authentication (good for VC demos)
Live Activity Feed auto-refreshes every 5 seconds for real-time feel
Investment Thesis Card provides actionable investment analysis
Early Investor Bonus system (2.5x/2.0x/1.5x) is clearly displayed
Price impact on trades is calculated and shown to users
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo user and test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investor Demo Flow fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/platform/investor-metrics (public), /api/activity/live (live feed), /api/watchlist (investment thesis), /api/portfolio (holdings). All features ready for VC presentation.
